ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration Is Set For 07-16-25
Off Calendar Oct-08-2025 Continued To Nov-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nancy Lofdahl for administrator Edward Ai Huang (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

Ms. Lofdahl reported that the petition for final distribution was nearly ready for filing, pending final review and approval by the administrator. She anticipated filing by the end of the following week.

The Court continued the matter to November 17, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
